headline: 1 Consumer Stock with Impressive Fundamentals and 2 That Underwhelm
summary: Retailers are adapting their business models as technology changes how people shop. But many seem to be moving too slowly as their demand is lagging, causing the industry to underperform the market - over the past six months, retail stocks' 2.1% return has fallen short of the S&P 500’s 4.1% gain.
